prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial food photography of a slice of traditional German Bienenstich cake (bee sting cake) and a rustic Apfelkuchen (apple cake) on a worn wooden pastry board, dusted with powdered sugar. The Bienenstich has a golden caramelized almond topping and a thick vanilla cream filling visible in the cross-section. The Apfelkuchen shows layers of cinnamon-spiced apple slices arranged in a perfect fan pattern, glazed with apricot jam. Both cakes have a warm golden-brown crust. A small silver cake fork rests beside them on a folded linen cloth. Soft warm natural window light from the left, slightly warm and diffused. 85mm lens, f/3.5, ISO 160. Documentary food photography. Visible crumb texture, powdered sugar particles in the air, natural imperfections. No artificial light, no heavy styling.
negative_prompt: plastic, CGI, cartoon, studio light, artificial, stock photo, flat background, modern industrial, overexposed, neon colors, perfect symmetry, synthetic cream, watermark, blurry

settings.lighting: soft warm natural window light, gentle side shadows
settings.depth_of_field: shallow, cake slice sharp, background soft
settings.quality: ultra high detail, visible crumb texture, powdered sugar particles
